languages.text: Но мудрость Бога-Императора все еще оставалась со мной. Вокс-аугмент, заменивший мою гортань, стократ усилил мой голос, заставив его возвыситься над погребальной песнью гробницы. Наследни{mf|к|ца} перв{mf|ым|ой} услышал{mf||а} мое воззвание — и наш{mf|ел|ла} в себе силы воспрять. Вдохновленные примером, за {mf|ним|ней} последовали и остальные.

Yet the wisdom of the God-Emperor was still with me. The vox-augment that had replaced my throat amplified my voice a hundredfold, letting it drown out the crypt's dirge. My heir was the first to hear my call — and {mf|he|she} found the strength to rise to it. Others followed, inspired by {mf|his|her} example.
languages.original_text: Но мудрость Бога-Императора все еще оставалась со мной. Вокс-аугмент, заменивший мою гортань, стократ усилил мой голос, заставив его возвыситься над погребальной песнью гробницы. Наследни{mf|к|ца} перв{mf|ым|ой} услышал{mf||а} мое воззвание — и наш{mf|ел|ла} в себе силы воспрять. Вдохновленные примером, за {mf|ним|ней} последовали и остальные.

traits.locale_text: Yet the wisdom of the God-Emperor was still with me. The vox-augment that had replaced my throat amplified my voice a hundredfold, letting it drown out the crypt's dirge. My heir was the first to hear my call — and {mf|he|she} found the strength to rise to it. Others followed, inspired by {mf|his|her} example.

Yet the wisdom of the Omnissiah was still with me. The vox-augment that had replaced my throat amplified my voice a hundredfold, making it drown out the crypt's dirge. My heir was the first to hear my call — and {mf|he|she} found the strength to rise to it. Others followed, inspired by {mf|his|her} example.

My heir was the first to hear my call — and {mf|he|she} found the strength to rise to it. Others followed, inspired by {mf|his|her} example.

Yet the wisdom of the Omnissiah was still with me. The vox-augment that had replaced my throat amplified my voice a hundredfold, letting it drown out the crypt's dirge. My heir was the first to hear my call — and {mf|he|she} found the strength to rise to it. Others followed, inspired by {mf|his|her} example.

Yet the wisdom of the God-Emperor was still with me. The vox-augment that had replaced my throat amplified my voice a hundredfold, letting it drown out the crypt's dirge. My heir was the first to hear my call — and {mf|he|she} found the strength to rise to it. Others followed, inspired by {mf|his|her} example.

languages.text: Sin embargo, la sabiduría del Dios Emperador aún me acompañaba. El voco-aumento que había sustituido mi garganta amplificó mi voz cien veces, permitiendo que ahogara el sonido de la cripta. Mi hereder{mf|o|a} fue {mf|el|la} primer{mf|o|a} en escucharme y logró sobreponerse. Otros más siguieron su ejemplo.
languages.original_text: Yet the wisdom of the God-Emperor was still with me. The vox-augment that had replaced my throat amplified my voice a hundredfold, letting it drown out the crypt's dirge. My heir was the first to hear my call — and {mf|he|she} found the strength to rise to it. Others followed, inspired by {mf|his|her} example.

traits.locale_text: Sin embargo, la sabiduría del Dios Emperador aún me acompañaba. El voco-aumento que había sustituido mi garganta amplificó mi voz cien veces, permitiendo que ahogara el sonido de la cripta. Mi hereder{mf|o|a} fue {mf|el|la} primer{mf|o|a} en escucharme y logró sobreponerse. Otros más siguieron su ejemplo.

languages.text: Pourtant, j'étais encore habité par la sagesse de l'Empereur-Dieu. L'augmentation-vox qui remplace ma gorge amplifiait ma voix au centuple, lui permettant de couvrir le chant funèbre de la crypte. Mon {mf|héritier|héritière} a été {mf|le premier|la première} à entendre mon appel, et {mf|le premier|la première} également à trouver la force d'y répondre. Très vite, d'autres suivirent son exemple.
languages.original_text: Yet the wisdom of the God-Emperor was still with me. The vox-augment that had replaced my throat amplified my voice a hundredfold, letting it drown out the crypt's dirge. My heir was the first to hear my call — and {mf|he|she} found the strength to rise to it. Others followed, inspired by {mf|his|her} example.

traits.locale_text: Pourtant, j'étais encore habité par la sagesse de l'Empereur-Dieu. L'augmentation-vox qui remplace ma gorge amplifiait ma voix au centuple, lui permettant de couvrir le chant funèbre de la crypte. Mon {mf|héritier|héritière} a été {mf|le premier|la première} à entendre mon appel, et {mf|le premier|la première} également à trouver la force d'y répondre. Très vite, d'autres suivirent son exemple.

languages.text: 然而神皇的智慧仍与我同在。替代我喉咙的音阵植入物将我的声音放大了百倍，压过了墓穴的挽歌。我的继承人最先听到呼唤，从中找到了奋起的力量。在这一榜样的激励下，其他人也陆续振作起来。
languages.original_text: Yet the wisdom of the God-Emperor was still with me. The vox-augment that had replaced my throat amplified my voice a hundredfold, letting it drown out the crypt's dirge. My heir was the first to hear my call — and {mf|he|she} found the strength to rise to it. Others followed, inspired by {mf|his|her} example.

traits.locale_text: 然而神皇的智慧仍与我同在。替代我喉咙的音阵植入物将我的声音放大了百倍，压过了墓穴的挽歌。我的继承人最先听到呼唤，从中找到了奋起的力量。在这一榜样的激励下，其他人也陆续振作起来。

languages.text: Doch die Weisheit des Gottimperators war noch immer bei mir. Die Voxaugmentation, die meinen Kehlkopf ersetzte, verstärkte meine Stimme hundertfach und übertöne den Leichengesang der Krypta. {mf|Mein Erbe|Meine Erbin} hörte meinen Ruf zuerst ... und fand die Stärke, ihm zu folgen. Andere folgten {mf|ihm|ihr} beseelt von {mf|seinem|ihrem} Beispiel.
languages.original_text: Yet the wisdom of the God-Emperor was still with me. The vox-augment that had replaced my throat amplified my voice a hundredfold, letting it drown out the crypt's dirge. My heir was the first to hear my call — and {mf|he|she} found the strength to rise to it. Others followed, inspired by {mf|his|her} example.

traits.locale_text: Doch die Weisheit des Gottimperators war noch immer bei mir. Die Voxaugmentation, die meinen Kehlkopf ersetzte, verstärkte meine Stimme hundertfach und übertöne den Leichengesang der Krypta. {mf|Mein Erbe|Meine Erbin} hörte meinen Ruf zuerst ... und fand die Stärke, ihm zu folgen. Andere folgten {mf|ihm|ihr} beseelt von {mf|seinem|ihrem} Beispiel.

languages.text: Yine de Tanrı İmparator'un bilgeliği hâlâ benimleydi. Boğazımın yerini alan voks ogmenti, sesimi yüz kat güçlendirerek mahzenin ağıdını bastırmasını sağladı. Çağrımı ilk duyan vârisimdi... Ayağa kalkma gücünü buldu. Diğerleri de onu örnek alıp peşinden gitti.
languages.original_text: Yet the wisdom of the God-Emperor was still with me. The vox-augment that had replaced my throat amplified my voice a hundredfold, letting it drown out the crypt's dirge. My heir was the first to hear my call — and {mf|he|she} found the strength to rise to it. Others followed, inspired by {mf|his|her} example.

traits.locale_text: Yine de Tanrı İmparator'un bilgeliği hâlâ benimleydi. Boğazımın yerini alan voks ogmenti, sesimi yüz kat güçlendirerek mahzenin ağıdını bastırmasını sağladı. Çağrımı ilk duyan vârisimdi... Ayağa kalkma gücünü buldu. Diğerleri de onu örnek alıp peşinden gitti.

languages.text: しかし、神皇帝の知恵は私と共にありました。喉を代えたヴォックス・増幅器が私の声を百倍に増幅し、墓所の哀歌を消し去りました。私の呼びかけを最初に聞いたのは私の後継者でした。そして、{mf|彼は|彼女は}その呼びかけに応える力を得ました。そして、他の者たちも後継者の例に倣い、立ち上がりました。
languages.original_text: Yet the wisdom of the God-Emperor was still with me. The vox-augment that had replaced my throat amplified my voice a hundredfold, letting it drown out the crypt's dirge. My heir was the first to hear my call — and {mf|he|she} found the strength to rise to it. Others followed, inspired by {mf|his|her} example.

traits.locale_text: しかし、神皇帝の知恵は私と共にありました。喉を代えたヴォックス・増幅器が私の声を百倍に増幅し、墓所の哀歌を消し去りました。私の呼びかけを最初に聞いたのは私の後継者でした。そして、{mf|彼は|彼女は}その呼びかけに応える力を得ました。そして、他の者たちも後継者の例に倣い、立ち上がりました。
